headline: How Investors Are Reacting To eBay (EBAY) Expanding Live Shopping And Investing In AI Resale Startup
summary: eBay recently expanded its eBay Live livestream shopping platform into the eBay Partner Network affiliate program and invested in AI-powered secondhand fashion startup Fleek, deepening its focus on interactive commerce and recommerce technology. Together, these moves highlight how eBay is trying to blend social-style shopping with AI-driven resale infrastructure to reinforce its role in high-engagement, secondhand categories. We’ll now examine how integrating eBay Live with affiliates shapes...
